label: Undertext layer label, e.g. manuscript name, part, and undertext description
locus: Locus of the undertext layer, e.g. ff. 10-25, 30-45
summary: A summary of the undertext layer. Describes the script, date, language, and content recovered via multispectral imaging.
extent: Extent of the undertext layer, e.g. 30 ff. (partial)

note: A note about the undertext script, e.g. round biblical majuscule.
A second note about the undertext script.
A note about the undertext ink, e.g. iron gall ink, heavily faded; visible under MSI.

layout.dim: Reconstructed writing area dimensions of the undertext
note: A note about the undertext layout, e.g. layout reconstructed from surviving line spacing.

text_unit.label: Undertext text unit label
text_unit.locus: Locus of the undertext text unit

para.locus: Locus of a rubric in the undertext
para.as_written: Rubric text as written in the undertext
translation: English translation of the undertext rubric
note: A note about this undertext rubric, e.g. partially legible under MSI.

assoc_date.value: Origin date of the undertext as a human-readable string, e.g. 5th c. CE
note: A note about the undertext date, e.g. paleographic dating.
Identity of the undertext scribe unknown.
Tentative origin place attribution for the undertext.

note.value: This is a general note about the undertext layer. Undertext layer records often describe the method of recovery and the state of legibility.
This is a condition note for the undertext layer, e.g. erased prior to reuse; recoverable only under multispectral imaging.
This is a foliation note for the undertext layer, e.g. folios in reconstructed undertext order not yet determined.

bib.citation: Full bibliographic citation string for a reference work cited at the layer level.
bib.alt_shelf: [Alternate shelfmark from an older catalog, e.g. 652]
note: A note about this bibliographic entry

bib.citation: Full bibliographic citation string. Second bib entry at layer level to show repeatability.

related_mss.label: Label for related undertext layers, e.g. other undertext layers from the same original manuscript
note: A note about the relationship between these undertext layers.

mss.label: Label of a related undertext layer or manuscript

program.label: Description program name
program.description: Full description of the program under which this layer record was created.

cataloguer.message: Cataloguer message describing what was done in this edit.
Second cataloguer entry to show the field is repeatable.
